import { IconDeviceDesktop, IconShirt, IconHome, IconBallBasketball, IconSparkles, IconCar, IconBook, IconMoodSmile } from '@tabler/icons-react' import { ScrollArea, ScrollBar } from '@/components/ui/scroll-area' import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs' const categories = [ { name: 'Electronics', value: 'electronics', icon: IconDeviceDesktop, content: ( <> Upgrade your digital lifestyle. Discover the latest smartphones, high-performance laptops, and cutting-edge home entertainment systems. ) }, { name: 'Apparel', value: 'apparel', icon: IconShirt, content: ( <> Refresh your wardrobe. Shop seasonal fashion trends, comfortable basics, and premium designer luxury pieces for every occasion. ) }, { name: 'Home & Living', value: 'home', icon: IconHome, content: ( <> Elevate your living space. Find modern furniture, chic decor, and smart appliances that transform your house into a dream home. ) }, { name: 'Sports', value: 'sports', icon: IconBallBasketball, content: ( <> Fuel your active routine. Gear up with top-tier athletic equipment, breathable activewear, and performance-tracking accessories. ) }, { name: 'Beauty', value: 'beauty', icon: IconSparkles, content: ( <> Enhance your natural glow. Explore luxurious skincare routines, vibrant cosmetics, and professional-grade self-care essentials. ) }, { name: 'Automotive', value: 'auto', icon: IconCar, content: ( <> Maintain your vehicle's performance. Browse quality replacement parts, premium interior accessories, and professional detailing kits. ) }, { name: 'Books', value: 'books', icon: IconBook, content: ( <> Expand your knowledge horizon. Dive into gripping fiction, insightful biographies, and comprehensive academic textbooks. ) }, { name: 'Toys', value: 'toys', icon: IconMoodSmile, content: ( <> Spark pure joy and creativity. Find educational games, interactive playsets, and beloved character toys for kids of all ages. ) } ] const Tabs14 = () => { return ( {categories.map(({ icon: Icon, name, value }) => ( {name} ))} {categories.map(tab => (

{tab.name}

{tab.content}

))} ) } export default Tabs14
